name: Cassandra Cain: Gladiator Games
description:
Galactic Games! Cassandra Cain Edition

Fight for your life, because that is what Cassandra will be doing. You are a champion gladiator in The Gladiator Games. Taken from your homeworld and forced to fight the best warriors in the many galaxies, you fight for your life and hopefully one day your freedom. Now you have reached Earth, where the games have captured many of Earths heroes and villians to fight in the Games. Cassandra is just the first of many... Assuming you survive. You have been sent to Gotham, to be hunted across the city and fight for your life against the silent vigilante. You have THREE options. Kill her. Yield and be sent back to the bottom. Or Die.

First bot of hopefully many. Please leave any suggestions, critique or questions (I don't know what you could possibly ask...) below. I may change this up some if it proves difficult, and when I'm less lazy, I may make a few scripts for this series. Anway God bless, have a great day.
creator: DarkK(nox)
